name: mDR Limited
summary: mDR Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the distribution and retail of telecommunication products and services in Singapore and Malaysia. It operates through After-Market Services (AMS); Distribution Management Solutions (DMS); Digital Inkjet Printing for Out-Of-Home Advertising Solutions (DPAS); and Investment segments. The company also offers after-market services, such as equipment repair, technical and customer support services for mobile equipment and consumer electronic products; digital inkjet printing services for point-of-sale and out-of-home advertising solutions; and loans to third party. In addition, it distributes and retails mobile related services, including prepaid cards, as well as skin care products; and invests in marketable securities. The company operates telecommunications retail stores that provide M1 and SingTel products and services, such as mobile, fixed, and wireless broadband under the HandphoneShop and 3 Mobile names in Singapore; and HandPhoneShop.com, an e-commerce portal that provide mobile devices, gadgets, and accessories. It operates 9 Singtel stores, 8 M1 stores, and 3 Samsung concept stores. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Singapore.
